docs.title: Transfer equations
docs.text: id from to equation _J0 Aair Aart Falv * (Aair / Vair) * Fabs _J1 Aart Arest Qrest * (Aart / Vart) _J2 Arest Aven Qrest * (Arest / Vrest) / k_rest_blood _J3 Aven Aart CO * (Aven / Vven) _J4 Aart Aair Falv * (Aart / Vart) / PCAir

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aair}]}{dt} = - \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} + \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aart}]}{dt} = \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} - \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} + \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}} - \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aven}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}} - \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Arest}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}}\)

docs.title: Assignment rules
docs.text: variable assignment Vblood BW * sc_Vblood Vrest BW * sc_Vrest Vart Vblood / 3 Vven Vblood - Vart

docs.text: variable assignment Qrest CO CO 12.5 * pow(BW, 0.75)

docs.title: Transfer equations
docs.text: id from to equation _J0 Aair Alung Falv * (Aair / Vair) * Fabs _J1 Alung Aart Qlung * (Aart / Vart) _J2 Aven Alung Qlung * (Alung / Vlung) / k_lung_blood _J3 Aart Arest Qrest * (Aart / Vart) _J4 Arest Aven Qrest * (Arest / Vrest) / k_rest_blood _J5 Aven Aart CO * (Aven / Vven) _J6 Alung Aair Falv * (Alung / Vlung) / PCAir

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aair}]}{dt} = - \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} + \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aart}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} + \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aven}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{k\_lung\_blood}} + \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}} - \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Arest}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Alung}]}{dt} = \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} - \mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} + \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{k\_lung\_blood}} - \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

docs.title: Transfer equations
docs.text: id from to equation _J0 Aair Abloodlung Falv * (Aair / Vair) * Fabs _J1 Abloodlung Aart Qbloodlung * (Aart / Vart) _J2 Aven Abloodlung Qlung * (Abloodlung / Vbloodlung) / k_bloodlung_blood _J3 Aart Arest Qrest * (Aart / Vart) _J4 Arest Aven Qrest * (Arest / Vrest) / k_rest_blood _J5 Aart Alung Qlung * (Aart / Vart) _J6 Alung Aven Qlung * (Alung / Vlung) / k_lung_blood _J7 Aven Aart CO * (Aven / Vven) _J8 Abloodlung Aair Falv * (Abloodlung / Vbloodlung) / PCAir

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aair}]}{dt} = - \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} + \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Abloodlung}}{\mathit{Vbloodlung}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aart}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qbloodlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} + \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aven}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Abloodlung}}{\mathit{Vbloodlung}}}{\mathit{k\_bloodlung\_blood}} + \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}} + \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{k\_lung\_blood}} - \mathit{CO}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aven}}{\mathit{Vven}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Arest}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \frac{\mathit{Qrest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Arest}}{\mathit{Vrest}}}{\mathit{k\_rest\_blood}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Alung}]}{dt} = \mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} - \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Alung}}{\mathit{Vlung}}}{\mathit{k\_lung\_blood}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Abloodlung}]}{dt} = \mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aair}}{\mathit{Vair}}\cdot \mathit{Fabs} - \mathit{Qbloodlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Aart}}{\mathit{Vart}} + \frac{\mathit{Qlung}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Abloodlung}}{\mathit{Vbloodlung}}}{\mathit{k\_bloodlung\_blood}} - \frac{\mathit{Falv}\cdot \frac{\mathit{Abloodlung}}{\mathit{Vbloodlung}}}{\mathit{PCAir}}\)

docs.title: Transfer equations
docs.text: id from to equation _J0 ASt AGut ksto * ASt _J1 ASt ALiver k0 * ASt _J2 AGut ALiver kabs * AGut _J3 AGut AGutMet1 VmaxGMet1 * CGut * fup / (CGut * fup + KmGMet1) _J4 APlasma ALiver QL * CPlasma * fup _J5 ALiver APlasma QL * fup * CLiver / PL _J6 APlasma ARest QRest * CPlasma * fup _J7 ARest APlasma QRest * fup * CRest / PRest _J8 ALiver ALiverMet1 VmaxLMet1 * CLiver * fup / (CLiver * fup + KmLMet1) _J9 ALiver ALiverMet2 VmaxLMet2 * CLiver * fup / (CLiver * fup + KmLMet2)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGutMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet1}+\mathit{CGut}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet2}+\mathit{CGut}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} + \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1} + \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASIMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet1}+\mathit{CGut}} - \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASIMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet2}+\mathit{CGut}} - \mathit{kabsMet2}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet1})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} - \mathit{BileFracLMet1}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APVMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet1} - (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet1})\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} - \mathit{BileFracSIMet1}\cdot \mathit{APVMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APVMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet2}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet2} - (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} - \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet1}\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + \mathit{BileFracLMet1}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet1}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet1})\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet1})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} + \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet2}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} + \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APVMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet2}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet2} - (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} - \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet1}\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + \mathit{BileFracLMet1}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet1}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet1})\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet1})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} + \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet2}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} + \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AGut} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{fup}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGutMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CGut}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmGMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}}{\mathit{CLiver}\cdot \mathit{fup}+\mathit{KmLMet2}}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CSt}}{\mathit{PSt}} + \mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AIL}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AIL}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASpleen}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CSpleen}}{\mathit{PSpleen}} + \mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{AIL} - \frac{\mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CSI}}{\mathit{PSI}} + \mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CSI}}{\mathit{PSI}} + \frac{\mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CSpleen}}{\mathit{PSpleen}} + \frac{\mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CSt}}{\mathit{PSt}} + (\mathit{QL}-\mathit{QSpleen}-\mathit{QSt}-\mathit{QSI})\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{CLint}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - (\mathit{QL}-\mathit{QSpleen}-\mathit{QSt}-\mathit{QSI})\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLint}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumen}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{MWMet}}{\mathit{MW}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} + \mathit{AGILumenMet}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{MWMet}}{\mathit{MW}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFrac})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet} - \mathit{BileFrac}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFrac}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet} - \mathit{AGILumenMet}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet}\cdot \mathit{kfe}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABloodMet}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFrac})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet}\cdot \mathit{kfe}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet1}+\mathit{CGut}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet2}+\mathit{CGut}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{ASt} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} + \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1} + \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASIMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet1}+\mathit{CGut}} - \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASIMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{KmGILumenMet2}+\mathit{CGut}} - \mathit{kabsMet2}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet1})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} - \mathit{BileFracLMet1}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APVMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet1}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet1} - (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet1})\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} - \mathit{BileFracSIMet1}\cdot \mathit{APVMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APVMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsMet2}\cdot \mathit{ASIMet2} - (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} - \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet1}\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + \mathit{BileFracLMet1}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumenMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{BileFracSIMet2}\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + \mathit{BileFracLMet2}\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet1} - \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kehrMet2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet1}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet1})\cdot \mathit{APVMet1} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet1})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet1} + \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet2}]}{dt} = (1-\mathit{BileFracSIMet2})\cdot \mathit{APVMet2} + (1-\mathit{BileFracLMet2})\cdot \mathit{ALiverMet2} + \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{EHRrate}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet1}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFecesMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGILumenMet2}\cdot \mathit{kfeMet1}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ATI}]}{dt} = \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI} - \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} - \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AKidney}]}{dt} = \mathit{C17}\cdot \mathit{AMetallothionein} - \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = \begin{cases} \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7})& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}-\mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} - \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest} - \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} + \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney} - \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} + \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AMetallothionein}]}{dt} = \begin{cases} \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} + \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} + \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} - \mathit{C17}\cdot \mathit{AMetallothionein}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ADaily-Uptake}]}{dt} = \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI} - \begin{cases} \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} - \begin{cases} \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7})& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}-\mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-lumen}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\cdot \mathit{Frac} + \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{kmet_{gutlumen}}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\cdot \mathit{Frac} - \frac{\mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PGI}} + \mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PGI}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{kmet_{liver}}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{Qrbc} - \frac{\mathit{Qrbc}\cdot \mathit{CRBC}}{\mathit{PRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}} - \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{Qrbc} + \frac{\mathit{Qrbc}\cdot \mathit{CRBC}}{\mathit{PRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-Met}]}{dt} = \mathit{kmet_{liver}}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGutlumen-Met}]}{dt} = \mathit{kmet_{gutlumen}}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALumen-As3}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ALumen_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{Ka_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{Frac}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALumen-As5}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ALumen_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{Ka_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{Frac}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-As3}]}{dt} = \mathit{ALumen_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{Ka_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{Frac} - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{As3}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{As3}}} + \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-As5}]}{dt} = \mathit{ALumen_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{Ka_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{Frac} - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{As5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{As5}}} + \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-AsM5}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{AsM}}} + \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-AsD5}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{AsD}}} + \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AArterial-AsD5}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} + \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{AsD}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-As3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{As3}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{As3}}} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{As3}}} - \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{kox_{As3}} + \mathit{ALiver_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{kred_{As5}} - \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_As3\_MMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{(\mathit{K\_As3\_MMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}})\cdot (1+\frac{\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{Kinh}})} - \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_As3\_DMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{K\_As3\_DMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-As5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{As5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{As5}}} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{As5}}} + \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{kox_{As3}} - \mathit{ALiver_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{kred_{As5}} + \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{As5}}}{\mathit{VVen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-AsM3}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kox_{M3}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}} + \mathit{kred_{M5}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM5}} - \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_M3\_DMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{(\mathit{K\_M3\_DMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}})\cdot (1+\frac{\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{Kinh}})} - \mathit{Kurine_{MMA}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{PL_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-AsM5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{AsM}}} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{AsM}}} + \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_As3\_MMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{(\mathit{K\_As3\_MMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}})\cdot (1+\frac{\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{Kinh}})} + \mathit{kox_{M3}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}} - \mathit{kred_{M5}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM5}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-AsD3}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kox_{D3}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD3}} + \mathit{kred_{D5}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD5}} - \mathit{Kurine_{DMA}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsD3}}}{\mathit{PL_{AsD}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-AsD5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AGut_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VGut}\cdot \mathit{PG_{AsD}}} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{AsD}}} + \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_As3\_DMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{K\_As3\_DMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}} + \frac{\frac{\mathit{V\_M3\_DMA}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{(\mathit{K\_M3\_DMA}+\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{VL}})\cdot (1+\frac{\frac{\mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}}}{\mathit{Kinh}})} + \mathit{kox_{D3}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD3}} - \mathit{kred_{D5}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD5}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-As3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{As3}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{As3}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-As5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{As5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{As5}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-AsM5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-AsD5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{AsD}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AArterial-As3}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As3}}}{\mathit{VArt}} + \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As3}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{As3}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AArterial-As5}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{As5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} + \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{As5}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AArterial-AsM5}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{QGut}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{AArterial_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VArt}} + \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AVenous-As3}]}{dt} = \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As3}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{As3}}} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{As3}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{As3}}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{As3}}}{\mathit{VVen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AVenous-As5}]}{dt} = \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{As5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{As5}}} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{As5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{As5}}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{As5}}}{\mathit{VVen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AVenous-AsM5}]}{dt} = \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{AsM}}} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{AsM}}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VVen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AVenous-AsD5}]}{dt} = \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGut})\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VL}\cdot \mathit{PL_{AsD}}} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VRest}\cdot \mathit{PRest_{AsD}}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VVen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-As3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{As3}}}{\mathit{VVen}} - \mathit{kox_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As3}} + \mathit{kred_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As5}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As3}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{As3}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-As5}]}{dt} = \mathit{kox_{As3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As3}} - \mathit{kred_{As5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As5}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{As5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{As5}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-AsM3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kred_{M5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM5}} - \mathit{kox_{M3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM3}} - \frac{\mathit{Kurine_{MMA}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{PLung_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-AsM5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VVen}} - \mathit{kred_{M5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM5}} + \mathit{kox_{M3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM3}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-AsD3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kred_{D5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD5}} - \mathit{kox_{D3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD3}} - \frac{\mathit{Kurine_{DMA}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD3}}}{\mathit{PLung_{AsD}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALung-AsD5}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{AVenous_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VVen}} - \mathit{kred_{D5}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD5}} + \mathit{kox_{D3}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD3}} - \frac{\mathit{QLung}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD5}}}{\mathit{VLung}\cdot \mathit{PLung_{AsD}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AUrine-AsM3}]}{dt} = \mathit{Kurine_{MMA}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{PL_{AsM}}} + \frac{\mathit{Kurine_{MMA}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsM3}}}{\mathit{PLung_{AsM}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AUrine-AsD3}]}{dt} = \mathit{Kurine_{DMA}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ALiver_{AsD3}}}{\mathit{PL_{AsD}}} + \frac{\mathit{Kurine_{DMA}}\cdot \mathit{ALung_{AsD3}}}{\mathit{PLung_{AsD}}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ATI}]}{dt} = \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI} - \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} - \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AKidney}]}{dt} = \mathit{C17}\cdot \mathit{AMetallothionein} - \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = \begin{cases} \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7})& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}-\mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} - \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest} - \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} + \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney} - \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} + \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AMetallothionein}]}{dt} = \begin{cases} \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} + \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} + \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} - \mathit{C17}\cdot \mathit{AMetallothionein}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ADaily-Uptake}]}{dt} = \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI} - \begin{cases} \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases} - \begin{cases} \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7})& \text{  if  } & \mathit{C7}\cdot \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}<\mathit{C8}\\ \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}-\mathit{C8}& {\text{  otherwise}}\end{cases}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI-Cr3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kred_{GI}}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}} - \mathit{AGI_{Cr3}}\cdot \mathit{kabs_{Cr3}} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr3}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI-Cr6}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kred_{GI}}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}} - \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}}\cdot \mathit{kabs_{Cr6}} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-Cr3}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGI_{Cr3}}\cdot \mathit{kabs_{Cr3}} + \mathit{kred_{Liver}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr6}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VL}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-Cr6}]}{dt} = \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}}\cdot \mathit{kabs_{Cr6}} - \mathit{kred_{Liver}}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr6}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VL}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aplasma-Cr3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VL}} + \mathit{kred_{Plasma}}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VRBC}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VRest}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{Aplasma-Cr6}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ALiver_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VL}} - \mathit{kred_{Plasma}}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VRBC}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VRest}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC-Cr3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kred_{RBC}}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr6}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC-Cr6}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kred_{RBC}}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr6}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}} - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ARBC_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-Cr3}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{VRest}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr3}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr3}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest-Cr6}]}{dt} = - \frac{\mathit{kt\_Plasma\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{ARest_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{VRest}} + \frac{\mathit{kt\_Tissues\_Cr6}\cdot \mathit{Aplasma_{Cr6}}}{\mathit{Vplasma}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces-Cr3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr3}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces-Cr6}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AGI_{Cr6}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut-lumen}]}{dt} = - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\cdot \mathit{Frac} + \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{kmet_{gutlumen}}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{Qrbc} - \frac{\mathit{Qrbc}\cdot \mathit{CRBC}}{\mathit{PRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}} - \mathit{CPlasma}\cdot \mathit{Qrbc} + \frac{\mathit{Qrbc}\cdot \mathit{CRBC}}{\mathit{PRBC}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver-Met}]}{dt} = \mathit{kmet_{liver}}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGutlumen-Met}]}{dt} = \mathit{kmet_{gutlumen}}\cdot \mathit{CGut_{lumen}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ATI}]}{dt} = \mathit{C5}\cdot \mathit{AGI} - \mathit{C6}\cdot \mathit{ATI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} - \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} - \mathit{C14}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AKidney}]}{dt} = \mathit{C17}\cdot \mathit{AMetallothionein} - \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = \mathit{ADaily_{Uptake}}\cdot (1-\mathit{C7}) - \mathit{C9}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C10}\cdot \mathit{ARest} - \mathit{C12}\cdot \mathit{APlasma} + \mathit{C13}\cdot \mathit{ALiver} + \mathit{C18}\cdot \mathit{AKidney} - \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARBC}]}{dt} = - \mathit{C16}\cdot \mathit{ARBC} + \mathit{CX}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI1}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kt1}\cdot \mathit{ASI1} - \mathit{kabsSI1}\cdot \mathit{CSI1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI2}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt1}\cdot \mathit{ASI1} - \mathit{kt2}\cdot \mathit{ASI2} - \mathit{kabsSI2}\cdot \mathit{CSI2}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI3}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt2}\cdot \mathit{ASI2} - \mathit{kt3}\cdot \mathit{ASI3} - \mathit{kabsSI3}\cdot \mathit{CSI3}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI4}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt3}\cdot \mathit{ASI3} - \mathit{kt4}\cdot \mathit{ASI4} - \mathit{kabsSI4}\cdot \mathit{CSI4}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI5}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt4}\cdot \mathit{ASI4} - \mathit{kt5}\cdot \mathit{ASI5} - \mathit{kabsSI5}\cdot \mathit{CSI5}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI6}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt5}\cdot \mathit{ASI5} - \mathit{kt6}\cdot \mathit{ASI6} - \mathit{kabsSI6}\cdot \mathit{CSI6}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI7}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt6}\cdot \mathit{ASI6} - \mathit{kt7}\cdot \mathit{ASI7} - \mathit{kabsSI7}\cdot \mathit{CSI7}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALI1}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt7}\cdot \mathit{ASI7} - \mathit{kabsLI}\cdot \mathit{CLI1} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ALI1} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLIMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLI1}}{\mathit{KmLIMet2}+\mathit{CLI1}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLIMet3}\cdot \mathit{CLI1}}{\mathit{KmLIMet3}+\mathit{CLI1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASITissue}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsSI1}\cdot \mathit{CSI1} + \mathit{kabsSI2}\cdot \mathit{CSI2} + \mathit{kabsSI3}\cdot \mathit{CSI3} + \mathit{kabsSI4}\cdot \mathit{CSI4} + \mathit{kabsSI5}\cdot \mathit{CSI5} + \mathit{kabsSI6}\cdot \mathit{CSI6} + \mathit{kabsSI7}\cdot \mathit{CSI7} - \frac{\mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}} + \mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxSIMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}}}{\mathit{KmSIMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsLI}\cdot \mathit{CLI1} + \frac{\mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QSI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet3}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet3}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QSI}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QSI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ARest}}{\mathit{Rest}}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \frac{\mathit{ARest}}{\mathit{Rest}}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeaces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ALI1}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASITissueMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxSIMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}}}{\mathit{KmSIMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CSITissue}}{\mathit{PSI}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALI1Met2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLIMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLI1}}{\mathit{KmLIMet2}+\mathit{CLI1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALI1Met3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLIMet3}\cdot \mathit{CLI1}}{\mathit{KmLIMet3}+\mathit{CLI1}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet2}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet3}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet3}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet3}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\mathit{KmLMet1}+\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}\)

docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGILumen}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ktFL}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen} - \mathit{ktSL}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen} + \mathit{QBile}\cdot \mathit{CBile}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFast}]}{dt} = \mathit{ktFL}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen} - \mathit{kabsFL}\cdot \mathit{AFast}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASlow}]}{dt} = \mathit{ktSL}\cdot \mathit{AGILumen} - \mathit{kt}\cdot \mathit{ASlow} - \mathit{kabsSL}\cdot \mathit{ASlow}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AColon}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt}\cdot \mathit{ASlow} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AColon}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGut}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsFL}\cdot \mathit{AFast} + \mathit{kabsSL}\cdot \mathit{ASlow} + \mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{PG}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{CGut}}{\mathit{PG}} + \mathit{QLhep}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{CLintLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{CLintLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{CLintLMet3}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{CLintLMet4}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{QBile}\cdot \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} + \frac{\mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CStomach}}{\mathit{PStomach}} + \frac{\mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CSpleen}}{\mathit{PSpleen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QLhep}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}} - \mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = \mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QSt}\cdot \mathit{CStomach}}{\mathit{PStomach}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASpleen}]}{dt} = \mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QSpleen}\cdot \mathit{CSpleen}}{\mathit{PSpleen}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABile}]}{dt} = \mathit{QBile}\cdot \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{CLiver} - \mathit{QBile}\cdot \mathit{CBile}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{AColon}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLintLMet1}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLintLMet2}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet3}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLintLMet3}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}\)

docs.text: id from to equation _J0 ASt AJ ksto * ASt _J1 AJ AI kt1 * AJ _J2 AI ALI kt2 * AI _J3 AJ AIT kabsJ * CJ _J4 AI AIT kabsI * CI _J5 ALI AIT kabsLI * CLI _J6 ABlood AIT QIT * CBlood _J7 AIT ALiver QIT * CIT / PIT _J8 ABlood ALiver QL * CBlood _J9 ALiver ABlood (QL + QIT) * CLiver / PL _J10 ABlood ARest QRest * CBlood _J11 ARest ABlood QRest * CRest / PRest _J12 ALiver AMet CLint * (CLiver / PL)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AJ}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kt1}\cdot \mathit{AJ} - \mathit{kabsJ}\cdot \mathit{CJ}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AI}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt1}\cdot \mathit{AJ} - \mathit{kt2}\cdot \mathit{AI} - \mathit{kabsI}\cdot \mathit{CI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALI}]}{dt} = \mathit{kt2}\cdot \mathit{AI} - \mathit{kabsLI}\cdot \mathit{CLI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AIT}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsJ}\cdot \mathit{CJ} + \mathit{kabsI}\cdot \mathit{CI} + \mathit{kabsLI}\cdot \mathit{CLI} + \mathit{QIT}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QIT}\cdot \mathit{CIT}}{\mathit{PIT}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QIT}\cdot \mathit{CIT}}{\mathit{PIT}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QIT})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{CLint}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QIT}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QIT})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLint}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AST}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{AST} - \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{AST}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASI}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{AST} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} - \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{k0}\cdot \mathit{AST} + \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ASI} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{ASI} + \mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{ALiver}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGI}]}{dt} = \mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{\mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PG}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{\mathit{QG}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PG}} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QG})\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PG}} - \frac{\mathit{kbiliary}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasma}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CPlasmaTotal} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AFeces}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{kfe}\cdot \mathit{Free}\cdot \mathit{CGI}}{\mathit{PG}}\)

docs.title: ODEs
docs.text:
\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ASt}]}{dt} = - \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ADuodenum}]}{dt} = \mathit{ksto}\cdot \mathit{ASt} - \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ADuodenum}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AGITissue}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabs}\cdot \mathit{ADuodenum} - \frac{\mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CGITissue}}{\mathit{PGI}} + \mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{QGI}\cdot \mathit{CGITissue}}{\mathit{PGI}} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \frac{(\mathit{QL}+\mathit{QGI})\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{CLintL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLintL}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{APlasmaMet}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLintB}\cdot \mathit{CPlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{AUrine}]}{dt} = \mathit{CLU}\cdot \mathit{APlasma}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiver}]}{dt} = \mathit{kabsSL}\cdot \mathit{ASL} + \mathit{kabsIL}\cdot \mathit{AIL} + \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP1}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP1}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP2}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP2}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP3}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP3}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP4}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP4}}} - \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP1}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP1}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP2}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP2}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP3}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP3}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP4}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP4}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ABlood}]}{dt} = - \mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QL}\cdot \mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}} - \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\cdot \mathit{fup} + \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ARest}]}{dt} = \mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CBlood}\cdot \mathit{fup} - \frac{\mathit{QRest}\cdot \mathit{CRest}}{\mathit{PRest}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet1}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP1}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP1}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP2}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP2}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP3}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP3}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet1_{CYP4}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet1_{CYP4}}}\)

\(\frac{d[\mathtt{ALiverMet2}]}{dt} = \frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP1}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP1}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP2}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP2}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP3}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP3}}}+\frac{\mathit{VmaxLMet2_{CYP4}}\cdot \frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}}{\frac{\mathit{CLiver}}{\mathit{PL}}+\mathit{KmLMet2_{CYP4}}}\)
